name: Dehydrator Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the dehydrated ingredients in a large pot.
2. Add water and let it sit for a few minutes.
3. Stir in the dry white wine and remaining ingredients.
4. Cover the pot and cook over low heat for several hours until all flavors are well combined.
(Note: This method is used to preserve vegetables during peak season before storing them for later use.)
